assertions.description: AP2127K-3.3 LDO (U2) not detected as power regulator despite being present in BOM with correct value
No SWD debug interface detection despite SWDIO net being classified as debug
Neopixel/WS2812 level-shifted output circuit not characterized
REVIEW: Voltage divider detection false positive: R7 (100 ohm) / R11 (10K) with ratio 0.99 is actually a series resistor + pulldown on a PWM output, not a signal-conditioning divider
REVIEW: NRST pin flagged as connected to Neopixel net - this is likely a net naming/mapping error in the legacy parser, NRST would not be intentionally connected to a Neopixel data line
REVIEW: MOSFET load_type reported as led for all 4 channels - these are general-purpose PWM outputs for fans/heaters/LEDs, not specifically LED loads
